assertions.description: The Use-As-Dictionary response header name is acceptable to the Headers API.
The Available-Dictionary request header is acceptable to the Headers API.
The Dictionary-ID header is acceptable to the Headers API.
When Available-Dictionary matches the cached dictionary SHA-256, the local CDT route selects the dictionary-compressed dcb path.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{const base={dictionary:'const shared = true;',response:'const shared = true; console.log(shared);'};const probe=await fetch('/v130/compression-dictionary-transport-with-shared-brotli-and-shared-zstandard/cdt-shared/measure',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(base)});const probeData=await probe.json();const res=await fetch('/v130/compression-dictionary-transport-with-shared-brotli-and-shared-zstandard/cdt-shared/measure',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({...base,availableDictionary:probeData.actualHash})});const data=await res.json();return probe.ok&&res.ok&&data.selectedEncoding==='dcb'&&data.dictionaryMatches===true&&data.hasAdvertisedDictionary===true;}catch(err){return false;}})()

assertions.description: When no Available-Dictionary value is advertised, the local CDT route selects regular Brotli instead of dcb/dcz.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{const res=await fetch('/v130/compression-dictionary-transport-with-shared-brotli-and-shared-zstandard/cdt-shared/measure',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({dictionary:'const shared = true;',response:'const shared = true; console.log(shared);'})});const data=await res.json();return res.ok&&data.selectedEncoding==='br'&&data.dictionaryMatches===false&&data.hasAdvertisedDictionary===false&&data.advertisedHash==='';}catch(err){return false;}})()

assertions.description: When Available-Dictionary does not match the cached dictionary SHA-256, the local CDT route ignores dcb/dcz and selects regular Brotli.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{const res=await fetch('/v130/compression-dictionary-transport-with-shared-brotli-and-shared-zstandard/cdt-shared/measure',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({dictionary:'const shared = true;',response:'const shared = true; console.log(shared);',availableDictionary:'mismatched-hash'})});const data=await res.json();return res.ok&&data.selectedEncoding==='br'&&data.dictionaryMatches===false&&data.hasAdvertisedDictionary===true&&data.advertisedHash==='mismatched-hash';}catch(err){return false;}})()

assertions.description: Headers accept the dcb and dcz content-codings as legal token values.
